geography.data_source: Census 2011 ward boundary shapefiles, West Delhi district. Covers Rajouri Garden, Punjabi Bagh, Kirti Nagar, Tilak Nagar, Subhash Nagar, Hari Nagar.

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 West Delhi district tables. Density = 1580000 / 67.5 ≈ 23407. Established middle-class residential zone with strong Punjabi community concentration (post-Partition settlement).

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round MPCE distribution (West Delhi district). Slightly right-of-centre distribution — Punjabi Bagh and Rajouri Garden are upper-middle-class while Uttam Nagar-adjacent areas are lower-income. Kirti Nagar furniture market is a major informal economy driver.

commute_profile.data_source: DMRC Origin-Destination Survey 2022, Census 2011 Table D-13. Blue Line serves the east-west corridor to Connaught Place. Green Line provides north-south connectivity. Moderate car ownership (0.38) reflects upper-middle-class Punjabi Bagh/Rajouri Garden demographics.

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Composite scores. Moderate fare sensitivity (0.58) — middle-income but strong metro usage. Moderate political mobilisation (0.70) with active trader associations. Lokniti-CSDS 2024, ECI 2024 West Delhi constituency data.

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IHDS-II social capital module. Good clustering (0.61) reflecting established Punjabi Bagh and Rajouri Garden communities with strong neighbourhood ties and festival-based social interaction.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Kirti Nagar Furniture Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Asia's largest furniture market — ~500 showrooms, significant informal carpentry and delivery employment.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Rajouri Garden Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Major retail and food market, well-connected via Rajouri Garden metro station. Popular weekend destination.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Punjabi Bagh Club Road Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Upscale local market serving Punjabi Bagh residential colony.

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: AGENT_SPEC.md Middle Income Residential template (lines 729-740, normalised to 1.00). Sum = 1.00. Small business owners (0.10) slightly understated — Kirti Nagar furniture market and Rajouri Garden traders could push this higher in a refined model.

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from MCD councillor count, Kirti Nagar Furniture Association data, and Rajouri Garden market association records. Trader association leaders are strong Tier 2 influencers in this zone.
